footer.tagline: Structured supplier information — capability, quality evidence and contact — organised the way procurement teams expect.
footer.provenance: Inferred from publicly available evidence and verified with you during onboarding. These are typically the fields where suppliers unlock the most buyer trust — we quantify them together from your production data.

rfq.receivedBody: Thanks — our team will respond within 24–48 hours.
rfq.projectPlaceholder: Parts, processes, materials, target volumes, target timeline…

errors.projectMin: Tell us a bit more about the project (20+ characters)
